title: koanophyllon celtidifolium
intro: Koanophyllon celtidifolium is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the velvet-leaf or celtis-leaf guanacaste. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Koanophyllon celtidifolium include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Koanophyllon celtidifolium is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the leaves being dried and then steeped in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
